CI/CD Pipeline Configuration: The GitHub Actions workflow runs on push to any branch and on pull requests to main, executing lint, type check, unit tests, and integration tests in parallel jobs to minimize pipeline duration. The build job produces a Docker image tagged with the Git SHA and pushes it to the private ECR registry only on merges to main. Deployment to staging is automatic on main merge using a helm upgrade command against the staging Kubernetes cluster; production deployment requires a manual approval step in the GitHub Actions environment gate. Secrets are stored as GitHub Actions encrypted secrets and injected as environment variables at runtime, never written to logs.
